title: strychnos goiasensis
intro: Strychnos goiasensis, also known as the Goias nux-vomica tree, is a plant species in the Loganiaceae family, native to Brazil. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Strychnos goiasensis include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, Strychnos goiasensis is typically used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or as a dried powder, often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
